scene_summary.scene_description: G3 Jingtai Expressway in Beijing, camera facing south at K3+303. Dual carriageway with green anti-glare barrier separating directions. Left side (outbound) has 3 lanes plus emergency lane with vehicles moving away from camera (northbound/outbound). Right side (inbound) has 3 lanes plus emergency lane with vehicles moving toward camera (southbound/inbound). A white vehicle is stopped on the left emergency lane with trunk/hatch open. One truck visible on right carriageway. Sound barrier wall on right side. Timestamp shows 14:38 on April 1, 2026.

instances.description: White sedan with trunk open stopped on the left shoulder of G3 Jingtai Expressway for entire duration of video clip
instances.reasoning: Vehicle is stationary on highway shoulder for 5+ seconds with trunk open. The shoulder does not appear to be a designated emergency lane. On expressways, stopping on shoulders is prohibited except for true emergencies, and the extended duration with trunk open suggests the driver is engaged in activity rather than transient stopping. No hazard lights are clearly visible. This matches the indicator 'Vehicles parked on shoulders that are not designated emergency lanes'.

event_results.summary: One instance of illegal parking detected: white vehicle stopped on left highway shoulder with trunk open for extended period (5+ seconds). Vehicle is not in main travel lanes but is parked on a non-designated emergency shoulder area of the expressway.
